report.summary: Day 15 standup: 278 pages live (PUBLISH_QUEUE confirmed empty), GSC organic signals imminent (day 14-21 window, site is 15 days old), Sprint 58 loaded with DeFiLlama Live API as lead; rate limiting recently resolved, 3 Jefe blockers still pending, last sprint equivalent to ~$25K in human labor delivered at near-zero marginal cost.

sections.title: Analytics — Overnight Traffic & Site Health
items: 278 pages confirmed live in PUBLISHED_PAGES (published-pages.ts verified) — PUBLISH_QUEUE is completely empty as of Mar 16 comment in source

Google Search Console: No organic clicks or impressions yet — site is 15 days old; GSC signals typically emerge day 14–21 for new domains; first data could appear today or tomorrow — this is a critical watch moment
Data pipelines overnight: CoinGecko healthy (60s TTL + price fallback), DefiLlama healthy (TVL/yields confirmed routing to llama.fi) — no downtime incidents reported
Rate limiting: resolved on public API routes per latest publish cycle report — pipeline now protected as organic crawl begins
Fallback coverage: now configured per latest publish cycle — improved from 1/6 routes to configured state

Top expected organic performers once GSC activates: /tools/dca-calculator, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide, /compare/wallets/ledger-vs-trezor, /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 (highly timely — April 15 deadline 31 days away), /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide (mainnet April 2026)

Day 15 content output: 6 learn guides published (Stablecoin Payments 2026, Pendle Finance, Quantum-Resistant Crypto, Best Perp DEX, Crypto Tax 2026, Ethereum Pectra) — all with Article+FAQ structured data, OG images, and interactive calculators

HUMAN COST OF LAST SPRINT — 10 specialist roles activated in parallel over ~1 day equivalent: Senior Crypto Researcher (6 briefs, $600), Content Writers ×2 (~19,100 words total, $912), SEO Specialist (6 pages, $432), Frontend Devs ×2 (6 scaffolds + 3 components, $1,392), Graphic Designer (10 assets, $612), Social Media Manager (11 posts, $180), PM ($264), QA Engineer ($240), DevOps ($156), UX Designer (10 improvements, $288) → Day equivalent: $5,076. Full 5-day sprint equivalent: ~$25,380. Annualized at this pace: ~$1.32M/yr. Marginal agent cost per sprint: ~$0.

SHIPPED ✅ 5 pages promoted to PUBLISHED via publish cycle: /crypto-loans, /crypto-loans/best, /exchanges/best/us, /wallets/best/hardware, /investing/crypto/bitcoin

BLOCKED (Jefe) 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — repo Settings → Actions; blocks Playwright CI before Sprint 58 merges
BLOCKED (Jefe) 🟡 Chrome extension reconnect — required for automated Vercel deploys
Sprint 58 pipeline: 6 items loaded — DeFiLlama Live API (lead), Email Drip (Resend), Referral Backend + On-chain, dApp Guides 70–79, 2 TBD
Carry-overs into today: Fix 3 actionable TS errors, kick off Sprint 58 DeFiLlama Live API, trigger Vercel redeploy manually, resolve Jefe blockers

sections.title: CEO — Today's Top 3 Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — WATCH: GSC First Signal Day. We are inside the organic signal emergence window (day 14–21). Today or tomorrow could be the first time Google serves an impression from degen0x. Ensure every live page has clean metadata — spot-check top 10 expected performers; confirm structured data validates (Rich Results Test on crypto-tax-guide-2026 and ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide — both highly timely); internal linking quality matters right now as Google establishes authority signals. Delegate: SEO Content (metadata audit) + QA Tester (structured data validation).

PRIORITY 2 — Launch Sprint 58: DeFiLlama Live API. Bloomberg Screener V3 is the highest-potential traffic tool on the site running entirely on mock data. Replacing mock TVL/APY/Volume with real llama.fi feeds transforms it from a demo into a genuine resource that earns backlinks and repeat visits — real data = engagement = better ranking signals to Google precisely when GSC is activating. This is the single highest-credibility unlock of the sprint. Delegate: Data Engineer (pipeline + API wiring) + Programmer (Screener V3 integration). Target: ship before EOD.

PRIORITY 3 — Jefe: Clear the 3 blockers today. All three are under 15 minutes each: (1) WalletConnect production Project ID from cloud.walletconnect.com → set NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID in Vercel env — unlocks wallet auth for real mainnet users AND is required for Sprint 58 referral attribution; (2) GitHub Actions secrets in repo Settings → Secrets → Actions — unblocks automated Playwright CI before Sprint 58 merges; (3) Reconnect Chrome extension or manually trigger Vercel redeploy at vercel.com/0x-machina/cryptodegen/deployments. Total time: ~30 minutes for Jefe.
